content_body: Mountain Valley Farms, located in the serene countryside of Ellijay, GA, is a family-owned farm dedicated to sustainable and humane farming practices. Specializing in grass-fed beef, pasture-raised pork, and free-range poultry, the farm offers high-quality, naturally raised meats. Visitors can also explore the farm store, which features a variety of local and organic products, including fresh dairy, homemade preserves, and artisanal goods. With a commitment to ethical farming and exceptional quality, Mountain Valley Farms provides a unique and wholesome experience for those seeking fresh, farm-to-table products and a connection to the land.
title: Mountain Valley Farms
